headline: $23M Vistula Metropark advances — design consultant hired
paragraphs: Metroparks Toledo is advancing what will become its 20th park: a $23M riverfront park along Water Street between Olive and Magnolia. The Blade reported (April 22) Metroparks hired a design consultant; some elements expected to open later in 2026.
why_it_matters: Public green space is the most consistent leading indicator for private investment in adjacent parcels in Toledo. Expect land-banking activity within a 4–6 block radius of Water Street over the next 12 months.

locations.label: Water St (Olive to Magnolia)
locations.match: Water Street between Olive and Magnolia
